questions.question: Which produces more CO₂?
questions.subtitle: for the same 20 km journey

optionA.title: Car Trip
optionA.subtitle: 20 km
optionA.description: Car travel emits significantly more carbon.

optionB.title: Train Trip
optionB.subtitle: 20 km
optionB.description: Rail travel is more carbon efficient.

questions.fact: A car emits roughly 7x more CO₂ than rail travel for the same journey.

questions.question: Which emits more CO₂?
questions.subtitle: Mumbai–Delhi Route

optionA.title: Flight
optionA.subtitle: Mumbai–Delhi
optionA.description: Aviation is highly carbon intensive per passenger.

optionB.title: Train
optionB.subtitle: Mumbai–Delhi
optionB.description: Long distance rail travel is very efficient.

questions.fact: Domestic flights emit significantly more CO₂ per passenger than rail travel.

questions.question: Which emits more CO₂?

optionA.title: Hoarding Files
optionA.subtitle: Thousands unused
optionA.description: Cloud servers run 24/7 to store your data.
